General.Name: Evolution Energy Minerals Ltd
General.Description: Evolution Energy Minerals Limited engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties in Tanzania. It holds interest in the Chilalo Graphite project located in southern Tanzania. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is based in Coogee, Australia.

0.Name: Mr. Craig  Moulton B.Sc., BSc Hons, M.Sc.
